Off Calendar Jul-25-2012 Advanced From Aug-30-12 To Aug-08-12 At 03:00 P.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion By Hui Wen Dhang, Feng Chiao Lo, Ying Tsi, And Eric Ho To Enforce The Settlement Agreement Against Petitioner Leslie Thomas, Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 664.6; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities; And Declaration Of Marcus T. Brown
Off Calendar Aug-08-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marcus Brown for Hui Wen Chang, Feng Chiao Lo, Ying Tsai and Eric Ho (Respondents/Moving Parties). Leslie Thomas (Objector).

Parties presented oral argument to support their respective positions. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling, the Motion to Enforce the Settlement Agreement is granted and Mrs. Thomas is ordered to move out by August 31, 2012 (order for the same signed in open court). Mr. Brown's request for issuance of Writ of Possession is not granted.

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Valerie Jensen CSR #4401. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marcus Brown for Ying Tsai, Eric Ho, Hui Wen Chang and Feng Chiao Lo (Respondents).

The Court noted that Mr. Boessenecker was not present. Mr. Brown stated that they have mediation scheduled for August 18, 2011 with Andrew Zabronsky. Mr. Brown was advised to speak with the Mediator with regard to location of some of the Parties and the possibilty of them participating by telephone. The matter was continued to August 24, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Order For Removal Of Co Trustees And Appointment Of Successor Trustees From Petitioners; For Accounting; For Damages For Breach Of Trust; To Quiet Title; For Declaratory Relief; For Injunctive Relief; For Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs; And Sell Of 2630 Sutter Street Property
Off Calendar Jun-22-2011 Continued To Aug-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Justin Goodwin specially appeared for John Boessenecker for Petitioner Leslie Thomas. Marcus Brown for Hui Wen Chang, Feng Chiao Lo, Ying Tsai and Eric Ho. Harry Payne Sr. in Propria Persona. Harry Payne III in Propria Persona.

Counsel confirmed that the Sutter Street property had been sold. Mr. Goodwin is to prepare the order appointing Paula Bibbs as Temporary Trustee. The Court informed Counsel that a specific request/petition for an injunction was required. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation (order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation signed in open Court). Mediation is to be completed by August 19, 2011. The Parties are to report to the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by August 19, 2011. The matter was continued to August 24, 2011 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204. for status of mediation. Status of readines of mediation was set for July 26, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Off Calendar Jun-22-2011 Continued To Aug-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Application And Declaration For Ex Parte Hearing
Off Calendar May-27-2011 Denied

Petition For Order For Removal Of Co Trustees And Appointment Of Successor Trustees From Petitioners; For Accounting; For Damages For Breach Of Trust; To Quiet Title; For Declaratory Relief; For Injunctive Relief; For Award Of Attorney Fees And Costs; And Sell Of 2630 Sutter Street Property
Off Calendar May-10-2011 Continued To Jun-22-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Boessenecker for Leslie Thomas (Petitioner). Marcus Brown for Hui Wen Chang, Feng Chiao Lo, Ying Tsai and Eric Ho (Respondents/Objectors). Harry Payne, Sr. for Marc Payne and David Payne (Beneficiaries). Harry Payne, III (Beneficiary) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Brown stated that foreclosure was pending on the Sutter Street property, that Debtor Lawrence Huggins filed bankruptcy and spoke of a stay as to his interest in the property. Mr. Boessenceker stated that he filed an amendment to his petition to appoint Paula Bibbs as Successor Trustee, that he is asking that the Co-Trustee account for funds, that he and Mr. Brown disagreed as to the issue of the first mortgage and asked that the foreclosure be enjoined pending conclusion of this litigation. Discussions were held with regard to how to proceed, the affect bankrupcty would have on the matter, listing/sale of the property, the issue of Leslie's life estate, Leslie being a protected Tenant, closing out the Trust, paying off the liens and fees, payment to Leslie for improvements, etc. The Court informed Mr. Boessencecker that notice of the amendment was required and that consent from Ms. Bibbs was also needed. The Court suspended the powers of Mr. Wroten and Ms. Turnage (Co-Trustees). The Co-Trustees are to file their accounting by June 22, 2011. Mr. Boessenecker is to prepare the order. Both petitions were also continued to June 22, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of all issues.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
